creator: christer.solskogen@gmail.com
text:
ports/net/openser/Makefile contains "ONLY_FOR_ARCHS= i386" because of a pointhat bug from 2005. Removing that line from the Makefile will build openser without any problems on my machine.

Fix: 

remove "ONLY_FOR_ARCHS= i386" in Makefile
How-To-Repeat: install net/openser on amd64
